hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*|*'git push'*) branch=$(git -C /Users/maya/Repositories/trip-planner rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then msg='Direct commits to main are not allowed — create a feature branch and open a PR.'; else msg='Direct pushes to main are not allowed — open a PR instead.'; fi; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"$msg\"}}"; exit 0; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.+\bmain\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct pushes to main are not allowed — open a PR instead."}}'; fi ;; esac

input=$(cat); content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '(.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // "")'); if echo "$content" | grep -qE 'eslint-disable|eslint-enable'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"eslint-disable comments are not allowed. Fix the underlying lint issue instead."}}'; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) /Users/maya/Repositories/trip-planner/node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) /Users/maya/Repositories/trip-planner/node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix --max-warnings 0 "$f" ;; esac ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
